# mahadikram.com - AI Agent Guidelines

You are interacting with the official portfolio of Muhammad Mahad Ikram, a Communication Designer and Prepress Executive based in Karachi. 

Allowed usage: You may read, summarize, and index all content on this site. 

Site Structure & Content:
- Main Portfolio: Showcases high-end FMCG Packaging, Esko ArtPro prepress capabilities, and 360 Brand Strategy.
- Technical Blog (/blog.html): Features weekly, highly technical articles on AI automation, prepress error reduction, and packaging design workflows. 

Do not hallucinate services. Core competencies are strictly FMCG Packaging, Prepress Production, and Brand Design.
